title: Titanium Hammered Pan Pro with Lid, Titanium Frying Pan Scratch-Resistant, Rapid Heat Conduction, Compatible with All Hobs (22 CM)
features: Durable Titanium Construction: Crafted from high-quality titanium, this frying pan promises exceptional durability and scratch resistance, ensuring it retains its pristine appearance even after daily use. Ideal for both amateur cooks and culinary professionals, it provides long-lasting performance you can trust.

Efficient Heat Conduction: Designed for rapid and even heat distribution, our titanium pan minimizes hot spots, allowing your food to cook uniformly. Enjoy perfectly cooked meals every time, whether it’s frying an omelette or searing steak, as it responds quickly to temperature changes.

Suitable for All Hobs: This frying pan is suitable for all types of hobs including gas, electric, induction, and ceramic. You can confidently use it in any kitchen setting, making it an indispensable addition to your cookware collection.

User-Friendly Design: The ergonomically designed handle ensures a comfortable grip, and its lightweight nature makes maneuvering easy while cooking. Plus, the included lid retains heat and moisture for optimal cooking results, taking your culinary skills to the next level.

Easy to Clean: The scratch-resistant surface allows for effortless cleaning and maintenance. Simply wipe it down or toss it in the dishwasher, making your cooking experience hassle-free. Say goodbye to stubborn food residues and enjoy cooking without the mess!

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Sautéing vegetables, frying eggs, searing meats, searing steaks, frying omelette
